texto: I’m conscious of race whenever I’m writing, just as I’m conscious of class, religion, human psychology, politics — everything that makes up the human experience. I don’t think I can do a good job if I’m not paying attention to what’s meaningful to people, and in American culture, there isn’t anything that informs human interaction more than the idea of race.
explicacao: Citação de Dwayne McDuffie sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I’m conscious of race whenever I’m writing, just as I’m conscious of class, religion, human psych…” articula reflexao, ben-10, justice-league em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como justice-league e science-fiction.
